title: Cursed Blade Muramasa
description: Adds the legendary Muramasa from Japanese legends in a new structure.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/iKp6ZTQQb-E" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Sword and Sheath](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70658a64fbc1c11f0c4fa4da007882e08c058c85.png)

# Overview
This data pack/mod adds a stylized version of the legendary cursed katana of Muramasa from Japanese legends. It can be found within a new structure called the dilapidated temple which generates in cherry groves, jagged peaks, and taiga forests.

Beware of the curse! If the katana does not claim a life in time, it will take the user's instead.
# Features:
- Slice: a large cutting attack, left click and swipe
- Sheath Draw: a flurry of cutting attacks, hold in offhand for a second, then swap
- Dodge: grants I-Frames, tap crouch
- Parry & Guard: blocks incoming damage and retaliates if timed right, tap or hold right click
- Curse: deals true damage to the user after a period of time without killing, resets upon killing an entity with the katana

To instantly obtain the sword:

```
/function weeb:give_sword
```

To locate the structure:

```
/locate structure weeb:dilapidated_temple
```
